title: Create Advanced
description: Create Advanced builds off the popular Create mod with a suite of tools that empower you to build a world full of imagination.
body:
# Key Features:

## Mastering the Power of Create: 

Unleash careful automation and mechanical marvels of Create in intricate machinery and factories.
A World Re-Imagined—View breathtaking landscapes and diversified biomes of the world-gen mods, extending your horizon in exploration and base-building.

## Shape Your World: 

Be able to use the world-editing tools for effortless manipulation of the ground, making the perfect canvas for your architectural masterpieces.


## Unlock Your Potential, Not Your Frustration: 

Mods for creating and world editing and world generation can be very powerful, but by the same token, very hard for your computer. Create Advanced includes optimization mods directly from the Fabulously Optimised modpack, so you know that even the most ambitious of creations will run with smoothness. Build complex contraptions without the worry of crashes.
Features Play the way the game's supposed to be played, with all the bells and whistles, without losing lots of performance.

### Create Advanced is a playground for engineers and architects; 

it is a platform where one can unleash his creativity to its fullest limit and forge a world in his image.

# Recommended for:

Those players who love intricate mechanics in Create.

Fans of exploration and building worlds.

__**Those with mid-range computers or gaming laptops.**__

### Disclamer:

Keep in mind that we do not own any of the properties in the pack.
